hooks.prompt: Check if the file being edited is a Kotlin file (.kt). If it is, verify the edit does not introduce these coroutine anti-patterns: 1) GlobalScope.launch without justification comment, 2) runBlocking on main thread, 3) catching CancellationException, 4) using launchWhenStarted/launchWhenResumed (deprecated), 5) collectAsState() without WithLifecycle. If any pattern is found, warn but allow (exit 0). Only respond if a pattern is detected.
